g.text: An authorized device goes straight to /kids;
no guardian login and no Supabase round-trip
Open the app, tap Kids door
RequestStory on the library page • shipped
ADR-014: conditional now -- only a cold entry
or an unauthorized device reaches this step
ADR-014 -- one grant per shared device;
after this, the device needs no further
guardian sign-in for the child to read
yes -- valid grant already on device
ADR-014: crossing UP into the adult subtree from
single kid-to-adult boundary); once warm, moving
between guardian and admin pages is free
Planned target-state step, not yet built
The child-initiated request (Act 2, WS-B) is shipped: a guardian or admin
approves or declines it from /guardian/requests. A guardian can also
author a request directly from Intake without a prior child ask. Approval
of the generated storybook (ADR-005) remains the one mandatory admin gate
before any story reaches a child.
ADR-014 (device-authorized kid access): Act 1's guardian sign-in is now
conditional -- an already-authorized device skips it entirely for the
Kids door. The former per-page parental gate collapsed into a single
AdultGate at the root of the adult subtree: crossing UP from kid mode
re-demands the password; guardian<->guardian, guardian<->admin, and
admin<->guardian navigation is free once warm. See seq-device-grant.svg
